protein_name: Integrin alpha-10/beta-1 is a receptor for collagen. Belongs to the integrin alpha chain family. Widely expressed with highest expression in muscle and heart. Found in articular cartilage. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
